name: Fracture Line Co.
specialty: Specializing in rapid, efficient extraction of valuable artifacts from the ever-shifting rifts, Fracture Line Co. has earned a reputation for unmatched precision and speed.

members.name: Rhys Ironforge
members.note: A battle-scarred veteran with a cybernetic arm, Rhys is a stern, no-nonsense leader who commands respect through his unwavering resolve and strategic acumen.

members.name: Vex Lyrion
members.note: With eerie green eyes that seem to glow in the dark, Vex is a master of navigation through the labyrinthine Undercity. Her cryptic demeanor has earned her a reputation as a woman to be reckoned with.

members.name: Zephyr Stoneheart
members.note: A mage with a penchant for fire magic, Zephyr's quick, powerful spells have saved the team on countless occasions. His charisma, however, often clashes with Rhys's authoritative style.

members.name: Thorne Ironshield
members.note: Thorne's massive physique and imposing presence make him an intimidating figure. His loyalty to the group is unwavering, but his reckless nature sometimes puts the team in unnecessary danger.

visual: Clad in reinforced leather armors and brandishing an array of advanced weaponry, Fracture Line Co. moves through the Undercity like a disciplined squad. Their distinctive black and silver insignia, a fracture line running through an iron fist, is emblazoned on their gear, setting them apart from other adventurer crews.
reputation_note: Rumored to be heavily invested in the Iron Fang Consortium, Fracture Line Co. has earned a mix of respect and suspicion. Their rapid rise in the ranks of Undercity's elite has raised eyebrows, but their results speak for themselves.
